items.raw_excerpt: A Russian daredevil couple climbed to the top of the Empire State Building's towering spire in New York City on Wednesday to ‌unfurl a large banner urging world peace in what appeared to be an elaborate marriage proposal that ended in their arrests. Dressed in sleeveless black outfits and documenting…
items.summary_en: A Russian daredevil couple climbed the spire of the Empire State Building in New York City. They opened a large peace banner in what seemed to be a marriage proposal stunt, and they were arrested.
items.summary_ko: 러시아인 스턴트 커플이 뉴욕의 엠파이어 스테이트 빌딩 첨탑에 올랐습니다. 두 사람은 청혼 이벤트로 보이는 상황에서 세계 평화를 촉구하는 대형 현수막을 펼쳤고, 이후 체포됐습니다.
items.title_en: Couple climbs Empire State Building for proposal stunt
items.title_ko: 엠파이어 스테이트 빌딩에 오른 커플의 청혼 소동
items.title_original: Russian daredevils unfurl banner atop New York's Empire State Building in proposal stunt

items.raw_excerpt: The government says it wants to have women in at least 30 per cent of the legislative seats.
items.summary_en: Japan's parliament added just two more toilets for women lawmakers. The government aims for women to hold at least 30 percent of legislative seats. The small upgrade highlights slow progress on gender equality.
items.summary_ko: 일본 국회가 여성 의원용 화장실을 겨우 2개 더 늘렸다. 정부는 여성 의석을 30% 이상으로 확대하겠다는 목표를 세웠지만, 이번 조치는 성평등 진전이 더딘 현실을 보여준다.
items.title_en: Japanese women lawmakers get only two more toilets
items.title_ko: 일본 여성 국회의원, 겨우 변기 2개 더 받아
items.title_original: Japanese women MPs get just two more toilets

items.raw_excerpt: The sudden appearance of a large number of German flags in a small town in rural Germany has caused a flap in political and media circles. As local newspaper Siegner Zeitung reports…
items.summary_en: Unknown persons hung numerous German flags across a small town in rural Germany. The sudden display has triggered a police extremism investigation. Local newspaper Siegner Zeitung first reported the incident.
items.summary_ko: 독일 시골의 한 작은 마을에 알 수 없는 인물들이 독일 국기를 대량으로 게시했습니다. 갑작스러운 게양으로 경찰이 극단주의 혐의 수사에 나섰습니다. 지역 신문 지크너 차이퉁이 먼저 보도했습니다.
items.title_en: German flags mysteriously appear in small German town, sparking extremism probe
items.title_ko: 독일 작은 마을에 갑자기 등장한 독일 국기들…경찰, 극단주의 수사 착수
items.title_original: Police launch extremism probe after unknown persons hang numerous German flags - Brussels Signal

items.raw_excerpt: Besoin de prendre l’air, sans passer des heures sur la route ? Quand on vit à Lyon, quelques dizaines de kilomètres suffisent pour changer de décor. Entre nature, patrimoine et villages classés, voici 5 destinations à moins de 2 heures, pour s’évader le temps d’un week-end.
items.summary_en: Need fresh air without spending hours on the road? From Lyon, just a few dozen kilometers is enough for a change of scenery. Here are 5 destinations offering nature, heritage, and classified villages.
items.summary_ko: 리옹에 살면서 몇 시간씩 운전하지 않고도 자연을 만끽할 수 있는 방법이 있다. 리옹에서 2시간 이내 거리로, 자연과 문화유산, 그리고 아름다운 마을을 즐길 수 있는 5곳을 소개한다.
items.title_en: 5 weekend getaways less than 2 hours from Lyon
items.title_ko: 리옹에서 2시간 거리, 당일치기 주말 여행지 5곳
items.title_original: Envie de changer d'air ? Ces 5 destinations sont à moins de 2 heures de Lyon - SeLoger

items.raw_excerpt: Skip the crowds along the coast and discover this central Maine town offering charm, scenery, and experiences.
items.summary_en: This small town in central Maine offers quiet charm, beautiful scenery, and local experiences. Skip the crowded coast and discover a more authentic side of Maine.
items.summary_ko: 메인주 중부의 이 작은 마을은 한적한 매력과 아름다운 경치, 현지 경험을 제공합니다. 붐비는 해안을 건너뛰고 더 진정한 메인의 모습을 발견해보세요.
items.title_en: Try This Central Maine Town Instead of the Coast
items.title_ko: 북적이는 해안 대신 메인주 중부의 이 작은 마을로 떠나보세요
items.title_original: Ditch the Coast — Try This Central Maine Town Instead - Only In Your State

items.raw_excerpt: 'Fellesferie' is here, but what is it, why does a lot of the country take three weeks off and are you legally entitled to it?
items.summary_en: Norway has a tradition called 'fellesferie' where much of the country takes three weeks off together. This article explains what it is and whether you are legally entitled to it.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이에는 '펠레스페리에'라는 전통이 있어, 많은 사람들이 3주 동안 동시에 휴가를 떠납니다. 이 기사는 이 제도가 무엇인지와 법적으로 휴가를 받을 권리가 있는지 설명합니다.
items.title_en: 'Fellesferie': Everything you need to know about Norway's collective holiday period
items.title_ko: '펠레스페리에': 노르웨이 전체가 함께하는 휴가 제도
items.title_original: 'Fellesferie': Everything you need to know about Norway’s collective holiday period

items.raw_excerpt: Two girls around the age of 10 were found safe, but a third dangerous incident occurred on the same beach later on Tuesday.
items.summary_en: Two girls around age 10 were found safe at a popular Helsinki beach. Locals formed human chains to search for them. A third dangerous incident happened at the same beach later that day.
items.summary_ko: 10세 안팎의 여자아이 두 명이 헬싱키의 한 유명 해변에서 무사히 발견됐다. 시민들은 아이들을 찾기 위해 사람 사슬을 만들었다. 같은 날 오후 같은 해변에서 세 번째 위험한 사건이 발생했다.
items.title_en: Locals form human chains to find missing children at Helsinki beach
items.title_ko: 헬싱키 해변 실종아동 수색에 시민들이 사람 사슬로 나서
items.title_original: Watch: Locals at popular Helsinki beach form human chains to find missing children

items.raw_excerpt: Summer in Denmark means workplaces emptying for weeks on end and a flood of 'out of office' replies from colleagues and clients taking lengthy vacations. But have you ever wondered exactly how summer holidays of at least three weeks became so entrenched in Danish society?
items.summary_en: In Denmark, workplaces empty for weeks during summer holidays. Colleagues and clients send automatic 'out of office' replies while on long vacations. The tradition of at least three weeks of summer break is deeply rooted in Danish society.
items.summary_ko: 덴마크에서는 여름 휴가철이면 직장마다 수주간 텅 비고, 동료와 거래처에서 장기 휴가 '부재 중' 자동 회신이 줄을 잇는다. 최소 3주의 여름휴가가 어떻게 덴마크 사회에 이렇게 깊숙이 자리 잡았는지 그 유래를 알아본다.
items.title_en: Why do the Danes take such long summer holidays?
items.title_ko: 덴마크인들은 왜 이렇게 긴 여름휴가를 즐길까?
items.title_original: Why do the Danes take such long summer holidays?

items.raw_excerpt: A hospital in Veldhoven had to be specially converted to meet the needs of a woman who delivered four identical boys. Máxima MC announced the family was healthy and happy after an extremely rare delivery of quadruplets in the Netherlands. The hospital is equipped to delivery triplets but had to be modified to accommodate a fourth baby. The four boys were born at 29 weeks and are named: Adam, Amir, Hassan, and Hussein. “This was the first set of quadruplets...
items.summary_en: A hospital in Veldhoven had to be specially converted to accommodate the birth of four identical boys. The quadruplets were born at 29 weeks and named Adam, Amir, Hassan, and Hussein. The hospital normally handles triplets but added extra equipment for this extremely rare delivery.
items.summary_ko: 펠트호벤의 한 병원이 일란성 사쌍둥이를 출산하기 위해 특별 개조를 해야 했다. 네 명의 남아는 임신 29주에 태어났으며 이름은 아담, 아미르, 하산, 후세인이다. 이 병원은 평소 세 쌍둥이까지 분만이 가능했지만 이번 초희귀 출산을 위해 설비를 추가로 갖췄다.
items.title_en: Identical quadruplets born in Veldhoven
items.title_ko: 펠트호벤에서 일란성 사쌍둥이 출생
items.title_original: Identical quadruplets born in Veldhoven

items.raw_excerpt: After a 7.30 investigation exposed the increasing dangers of nitrous oxide use, NSW has announced reforms will come into place shortly.
items.summary_en: NSW has announced reforms to crack down on nitrous oxide canisters, known as 'nangs'. The move comes after a 7.30 investigation exposed the dangers of their use.
items.summary_ko: NSW주가 아산화질소 캐니스터(일명 '낭스') 판매를 단속하는 개혁안을 발표했습니다. 7.30 보도가 해당 물질 사용의 위험성을 폭로한 데 따른 조치입니다.
items.title_en: NSW cracks down on sale of deadly 'nang' nitrous oxide canisters
items.title_ko: NSW주, 위험한 '낭스' 판매 규제 강화한다
items.title_original: State cracks down on sale of potentially deadly 'nangs'

items.raw_excerpt: Farmers in southwestern Ontario say that weeks of extreme weather events, including torrential rain and hail, has made growing crops a challenge. Some say they're embracing a week of hot temperatures, which can help crops get healthy.
items.summary_en: Farmers in southwestern Ontario say extreme weather has made growing crops very hard. Torrential rain and hail damaged their fields. Now they hope the hot weather will help crops recover.
items.summary_ko: 사우스웨스턴 온타리오 농부들이 극단적인 날씨로 농사가 어려워졌다고 말한다. 폭우와 우박이 밭을 망가뜨렸지만, 이제 찾아온 더위가 작물 회복에 도움이 되길 바라고 있다.
items.title_en: Ontario farmers welcome extreme heat after weeks of storms and hail damage crops
items.title_ko: 온타리오 농부들, 폭풍·우박 피해 후 폭염을 반기다
items.title_original: Ontario farmers embrace extreme heat after weeks of storms, hail damage crops

items.raw_excerpt: SILVERSTONE, England, July 2 : Formula One drivers will do a parade lap of Silverstone before Sunday's British Grand Prix in mini-cars made of Lego bricks.The stunt is one of a series in a tie-up between the Liberty Media-owned sporting organisation and the Danish toymaker, following on from events at several
items.summary_en: Formula One drivers will drive mini-cars made of Lego bricks around Silverstone before Sunday's British Grand Prix. The stunt is part of a tie-up between Formula One and the Danish toymaker.
items.summary_ko: 포뮬러 원 드라이버들이 일요일 브리티시 그랑프리를 앞두고 레고 블록으로 만든 미니카를 타고 실버스톤 서킷을 돈다. 이 이벤트는 F1과 덴마크 장난감 제조사 레고의 협력 프로젝트의 일환이다.
items.title_en: F1 drivers to lap Silverstone in Lego cars before British GP
items.title_ko: F1 드라이버들, 브리티시 GP 앞두고 레고카로 실버스톤 주행
items.title_original: Drivers to lap Silverstone in Lego cars before British GP

items.raw_excerpt: Some Prince Edward Islanders will see extra money in their bank accounts on Friday as the province rolls out its new Island Essentials Benefit.
items.summary_en: Some people in Prince Edward Island will get extra money from the province on Friday. The new Island Essentials Benefit helps with higher living costs.
items.summary_ko: 이번주 금요일부터 프린스에드워드아일랜드 주민 일부가 주정부로부터 추가 지원금을 받는다. '아일랜드 필수 혜택'은 높아진 생활비 부담을 덜어주기 위해 도입된 제도다.
items.title_en: Prince Edward Island gives extra money to help with costs
items.title_ko: 프린스에드워드아일랜드, 생활비 지원금 지급 시작
items.title_original: Some Prince Edward Islanders to get extra money from province to help with rising costs

items.raw_excerpt: The community of Quesnel in northern B.C. is pulling out all the stops to attract U.S.-trained physicians and solve previously long waits for family doctors. A health-care recruiter in the community of around 10,000 people says the so-called "red carpet" approach is working — with at least four doctors committed to work there by the end of the summer.
items.summary_en: A small community in northern British Columbia is attracting American-trained doctors to solve long waits for family care. The town of about 10,000 people says its red-carpet approach has at least four doctors committed to start by summer.
items.summary_ko: 브리티시컬럼비아주 북부에 있는 작은 마을 퀘스널이 미국에서 훈련받은 의사들을 유치해 오랜 가정의 대기 문제를 해결하고 있다. 인구 약 1만 명의 이 마을은 '레드카펫' 전략이 효과를 보고 있으며, 올여름까지 최소 4명의 의사가 진료를 시작할 예정이다.
items.title_en: Small Canadian town rolls out red carpet for US-trained doctors
items.title_ko: 미국 의사 맞이하는 작은 캐나다 마을
items.title_original: Quesnel, B.C., rolling out the red carpet to attract U.S.-trained doctors — and it's working

items.raw_excerpt: Anlässlich der Schließung von drei Logistik-Standorten der Stiegl-Brauerei verlieren 48 Mitarbeiter in Tirol und Oberösterreich ihre Jobs. Man wolle sie bei anderen Logistik-Partnern unterbringen, heißt es aus dem Salzburger Unternehmen.
items.summary_en: Stiegl Brewery is closing three logistics sites in Tyrol and Upper Austria, cutting 48 jobs. The Salzburg-based company says it will try to place affected workers with other logistics partners.
items.summary_ko: 슈티글 브루어리가 티롤과 오버외스터라이히에 있는 물류센터 3곳을 폐쇄하면서 직원 48명이 일자리를 잃게 됐다. 잘츠부르크 소재 이 회사는 해당 직원들을 다른 물류 협력사에 배치할 계획이라고 밝혔다.
items.title_en: 48 Jobs Cut at Stiegl Brewery Logistics
items.title_ko: 슈티글 맥주 물류센터 폐쇄…직원 48명 해고
items.title_original: 48 Jobs weg bei Stiegl-Logistik - salzburg.ORF.at

items.raw_excerpt: Cidade apoia 11 cooperativas de catadores e amplia estrutura de coleta seletiva para receber investimento de até R$ 300 milhões em novo modelo de reciclagem
items.summary_en: Recife's selective waste collection program recovers 3,000 tons of recyclables each year. The city supports 11 waste picker cooperatives. It may receive up to R$ 300 million in investment for a new recycling model.
items.summary_ko: 레시페시의 분리수거 프로그램은 매년 3,000톤의 재활용품을 회수하고 있다. 시는 11개의 폐자원 수집원 협동조합을 지원 중이다. 새로운 재활용 모델을 위해 최대 3억 헤알의 투자도 유치할 예정이다.
items.title_en: Recife's recycling program recovers 3,000 tons per year
items.title_ko: 레시페 분리수거, 연간 3,000톤 재활용품 회수
items.title_original: Coleta seletiva do Recife recupera 3 mil toneladas de recicláveis por ano - Diario de Pernambuco

items.raw_excerpt: Copenhagen is a famously expensive travel destination for many tourists, but it's possible to get by in the Danish capital without going broke, if you know how.
items.summary_en: Copenhagen is known as an expensive city for tourists. But you can visit the Danish capital without spending too much. These tips help you save money on your trip.
items.summary_ko: 코펜하겐은 관광객에게 물가가 비싸기로 유명한 도시입니다. 하지만 덴마크의 수도에서 큰 돈을 쓰지 않고도 여행할 수 있는 방법이 있습니다. 이 팁들은 여행 경비를 절약하는 데 도움이 됩니다.
items.title_en: Five money-saving tips for a cheap trip to Copenhagen
items.title_ko: 코펜하겐 저렴하게 여행하는 5가지 돈 절약 팁
items.title_original: Five money-saving tips for a cheap trip to Copenhagen

items.raw_excerpt: Before you even get to the Netherlands, you might need to learn a bit of Dutch – but passing the easiest civic exams can be as simple as ABC. Kirill Svavolia, founder of Inburgering.org and a foreigner who has had to learn Dutch himself, believes that with a bit of effort, anybody can pass the A1 tests. “Mostly if you have a Dutch boyfriend or girlfriend, or husband or wife in the Netherlands, and you want to move to them,...
items.summary_en: A founder of Inburgering.org says anyone can pass the basic Dutch civic exam with effort. Having a Dutch partner helps but is not required. The A1 test is the first step for foreigners who want to move to the Netherlands.
items.summary_ko: 인부르헤링(Inburgering) 정보 사이트 창립자는 누구나 노력하면 기초 네덜란드어 시험을 통과할 수 있다고 말한다. 네덜란드인 파트너가 있으면 도움이 되지만 필수는 아니다. A1 시험은 네덜란드로 이주하려는 외국인이 가장 먼저 통과해야 하는 관문이다.
items.title_en: How to pass the A1 Dutch language exam in the Netherlands
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 A1 언어 시험 통과하는 방법
items.title_original: Welkom in Nederland! How to pass the A1 language exam

items.raw_excerpt: Secretaria de Desenvolvimento Econômico e Inovação disponibiliza espaço para curso de empreendedorismo no Bairro Novo
items.summary_en: Curitiba's city hall supports a free entrepreneurship course in the Bairro Novo neighborhood. The Department of Economic Development and Innovation is providing the space. Registrations are now open.
items.summary_ko: 쿠리치바 경제개발혁신국이 바이루 노부 지역에 무료 창업 강좌 공간을 마련했다. 시청 지원으로 운영되며 현재 수강생을 모집 중이다.
items.title_en: Free entrepreneurship course opens registration in Curitiba
items.title_ko: 쿠리치바 시청 지원 무료 창업 강좌, 바이루 노부에서 수강생 모집
items.title_original: Curso gratuito de empreendedorismo abre inscrições em Curitiba com apoio da Prefeitura - Prefeitura de Curitiba

items.raw_excerpt: The VB-G Ram G rural employment scheme was launched from Mukkavaripalle in Tirupati district, with farmer welfare as its focus, by Naidu, Pawan Kalyan and Chouhan.
items.summary_en: The VB-G Ram G rural employment scheme was launched from Mukkavaripalle village in Tirupati district. The program focuses on farmer welfare. Chief Minister Naidu, Deputy CM Pawan Kalyan, and Union Minister Chouhan attended the event.
items.summary_ko: VB-G 람G 농촌 고용 계획이 티루파티 지역 무카바리팔레 마을에서 공식 출범했다. 이 프로그램은 농민 복지에 초점을 맞추고 있다. 주총리 나이두, 부총리 파완 칼리안, 연방장관 초한이 행사에 참석했다.
items.title_en: Naidu, Pawan, Chouhan launch VB-G Ram G rural jobs scheme in Tirupati
items.title_ko: 나이두-파완-초한, 티루파티에서 VB-G 람G 농촌 고용 계획 출범
items.title_original: Naidu, Pawan, Chouhan launch VB-G Ram G scheme in Tirupati district
